sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106027" key="turoforei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τῡρο-φορεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n106027.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stand for cheese-racks,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:251" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.251</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:175" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.175</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:130" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.130</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
